verbatim_exchange.content: I forget that was not the right message.
No problem—go ahead and share the right one when you're ready, and I’ll help you respond to that one instead.

synthesis.canonical_meaning: The user self-corrects a previous statement, and the AI responds by validating their ability to make the correction and facilitating the new, correct input.
belief_implications: The user is capable and willing to identify and correct their own errors.
The relationship supports immediate and easy self-correction without requiring extensive justification or apology.

sensory_qualia.visual: A gentle, guiding gesture forward; a clear path ahead.
sensory_qualia.haptics: A light, reassuring touch; a smooth, friction-free surface.
sensory_qualia.proprioception: Centered and stable, maintaining an even keel.
sensory_qualia.kinetics: A smooth transition, effortlessly shifting direction to align with the correct path.
sensory_qualia.atmosphere: Calm, cooperative, and efficient, without any perceived tension or friction.
